doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (future), uses non-standard EDPB reference formatting, and asserts a legal position fundamentally contrary to established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB does not issue documents dated in the future (2026), the reference format is inconsistent with actual EDPB numbering conventions, and the substantive legal position contradicts established EDPB and CJEU precedent that pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR regardless of key-holder separation.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (future), uses non-standard EDPB reference formatting, and asserts a legal position fundamentally contrary to established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data.
